# Devotion — holydevotion.app

> A Christian faith companion app with Scripture-grounded spiritual guidance, available on iOS and Android.

## What is Devotion?

Devotion is a personal faith companion app that helps Christians grow in their walk with God through daily devotionals, AI-powered spiritual guidance, prayer journaling, Bible search, faith journeys, games, and community features. It is designed for individuals seeking daily spiritual growth and for churches looking to engage their congregations.

## Core Features

### Daily Path
- **Guided Prayer** — AI-generated personalized prayers across 12+ topics including anxiety, grief, gratitude, relationships, forgiveness, healing, and more.
- **Daily Devotional** — Scripture-based daily readings personalized by Bible translation and denomination.
- **Wisdom Challenge** — Two faith-based games: Holy Word (daily 6-letter biblical word puzzle) and Scripture Quiz (daily Bible knowledge questions).
- **Daily Saint** — Historical saint biography with reflection questions and AI-generated stories.
- **Seasonal Stories** — Liturgical calendar content for Lent, Holy Week, Easter, Pentecost, and other church seasons.

### Spiritual Guidance
- **AI Chat Guide** — Multi-turn conversation with a Scripture-grounded AI companion that remembers your story, powered by a two-agent validation system for theological accuracy and safety.
- **Crisis Protocol** — Automatic detection of crisis situations with redirection to professional resources.

### Bible & Scripture
- **Bible Search** — Semantic verse search across 31,102+ verses in KJV and WEB translations.
- **Chapter Reader** — Full chapter reading with verse highlighting and notes.
- **Verse of the Day** — Rotating daily verse with save, share, and AI explanation.
- **Saved Verses** — Personal library of highlighted verses.
- **Verse of the Day Widget** — Home screen widget for Android and iOS.

### Prayer
- **Prayer Journal** — Active and answered prayer tracking with reflections and follow-up notes.
- **Guided Prayer Topics** — 12 personalized prayer templates for common life situations.

### Faith Journeys
- **30-Day Programs** — Structured spiritual growth plans for anxiety, grief, forgiveness, new to faith, marriage, purpose, doubt, anger, and custom topics.
- **Three Phases** — Awareness, Rebuilding, and Identity phases with daily Scripture, reflections, journal prompts, and prayers.
- **Custom Journeys** — AI-generated 30-day plans based on any topic.

### Progress & Gamification
- **Light System** — Earn points for completing daily spiritual activities, progress through 10+ rank levels.
- **Achievements** — 50+ unlockable badges across Journey, Wisdom, Light, Prayer, and Community categories.
- **Streaks** — Consecutive day tracking with milestone badges.

### Personalization
- **Daily Wallpapers** — Sacred-themed phone wallpapers updated regularly.
- **User Memory** — AI remembers context from past conversations for personalized guidance.
- **Translation Choice** — KJV and WEB Bible translations.
- **Denomination Preferences** — Content personalized to your faith tradition.

## For Churches

Devotion offers a church management portal where pastors and church leaders can:
- Upload sermons with automatic AI transcription
- Create 7-day sermon study reflections for congregations
- Manage announcements, events, and broadcast notifications
- Run a community prayer wall with anonymous prayer support
- Share church-specific devotionals
- Track member engagement with analytics and pastoral insights
- Customize church branding (logo, accent colors, hero images)
- Manage member approvals and directory

Church members can join communities via invite code, participate in prayer walls, follow sermon studies, attend events, and share in community faith journeys.

## Pricing
- **Free tier** — Daily devotionals, limited guided prayers, scripture quizzes, prayer journal, saved verses, faith journeys, Holy Word game, church community access.
- **Pro subscription** — Unlimited guided prayers, unlimited quiz questions, all wallpapers, cloud sync, premium content, and advanced journey topics.
- **Church plans** — Starting at $49/month with a 7-day free trial.
